title: Wrogn Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Wrogn Advisory Limited is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Wrogn Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Wrogn Advisory Limited:
Wrogn Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn Advisory Limited!
